Sporty, playful shoes with soft fur textures and charming fox ears! These orange-and-white sneakers blend cozy woodland vibes with energetic streetwear style.

PBR materials for realistic shine and fur texture
Perfect for cozy, animal, or casual streetwear avatars
Stylish balance of fun and comfort
